parties.name: KING, YEHVONNE MICHELE 63 LOBOS STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94112

calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-14-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Yehvonne Michele King, Petitioner in pro per
Ms. King stated that she had lived in her mother's home for many years, during which she had put more that $100,000 into it. She stated that she would like to get a court ordered appraisal of it, and asserted it was worth $875,000.00. The Court stated that the matter before him was the Petition for Probate of Will and letters of Administration, and that it appeared the Petition was incomplete and notice not properly given. He asked Ms. King if she had obtianed legal counsel. She said that she had spoken with an attorney, but that he would only agree to represent her if she paid him $10,000, which she did not have. Ms. King said the property had a reverse mortgage and of $370,000.00 which complicated the matter, which made attorneys unwilling to take her case on. She said the property had gone through foreclosure, and that she had been evicted from the home and was now living out of a storage unit. She said that her status had been characterized as that of a tenant, rather than as an heir. The Court said he was limited to what was before him in the Petition, and that prospects for it being granted were not promising. The matter was taken under submission.
Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-13-2015 Continued To Aug-10-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Yehvonne Michele King, Petitioner in pro per.

Ms. King informed the Court that she has had difficulty obtaining an attorney, but that she has now found one willing to take the case on upon payment of a retainer. The Court stated his concern regarding the length of time the matter has been pending and asked what would be realistic for an adequate continuance to permit the new attorney to step in. Ms. King stated that three weeks would be sufficient. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was continued to August 10, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court stated that if there was no appearance on that date, the petition will be denied.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy K. Kabasares. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-06-2015 Continued To Jul-13-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-01-2015 Continued To Jul-06-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Yehvonne King in Propria Persona.

Ms. King reported that she has been talking to attorneys, has not settled with one yet and that the probate examiner has requested a few additional documents be filed which she will do this morning. The Court stated that if the issues are not resolved or if counsel is not in place by the next hearing the petition will be denied. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was continued to July 6, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-27-2015 Continued To Jun-01-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Yehvonne King (daughter) in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that there has been no response to the examiner's notes and that Ms. King was in need of representation. Ms. King reported that she does not have funds for an attorney, gave the court her work and education history, stated that the property profile is inaccurate, that her mother allowed her boyfriend to obtain a reverse mortgage prior to her death, that Ms. King was given 30 days to make a balloon payment, that she is now receiving notices indicating that the property has been purchased, that she is trying to obtain a loan modification, that this is the home she has lived in and worked on since the 1970's, that she is being evicted and is extremely stressed out. The Court stated that it would give her more time, that she needs help and needs to contact an attorney and that if an attorney is not possible she needs to work with the examiner and go through the information step by step to make sure that everything gets done. Ms. King stated that there is an attorney that is assisting her. The petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary was continued to June 1, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-13-2015 Continued To Apr-27-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The petitioner did not appear and the court took the petition for probate of will and letters testamentary off calendar.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Loos. (Not Reported)

On 4/13/15, add back to calendar for April 27, 2015 Per Sandy. Petitioner, Yehvonne King, sat through the entire conservatorship calendar on 4/9 because she got her hearing dates mixed up (her hearing was 4/6, not 4/9).
